name: Black Bottom Pie II
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Package Vanilla pudding mix (not instant)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch, heat-resistant, non-metallic pie pan, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 1 minute.
2. Combine cookie crumbs and sugar in a small bowl until well blended.
3. Stir the cookie mixture into the melted butter.
4. Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of the pie pan.
5. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until the crust has a crunchy texture. Allow to cool while preparing the filling.
6. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, empty the package of pudding mix.
7. Gradually stir in milk until smooth.
8. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
9. Stir and heat an additional 3 1/2 minutes or until the mixture boils. Stir occasionally.
10. Place wax paper on top of the pudding so that a skin does not form and chill in refrigerator.
11. While the pudding is chilling, whip cream.
12. Stir 3 tablespoons Crème de cocoa into the pudding.
13. Fold whipped cream into the chilled pudding.
14. Pour into the prepared crust and chill for 3 to 4 hours or until set.
15. Garnish top with chocolate sprinkles.
